---
title: 'Projects'
subtitle: 'Data analysis & visualization projects using R/Python.'
css: '/src/styles/projects.css'
toc: false
sidebar: false
listing:
  id: projects-listing
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, description, categories]
  grid-columns: 2
  image-height: "0px"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 20
---

```{=html}
<script>
(function () {
  var BREAKPOINT = 991;
  var sidebar, titleBlock, mainEl, quartoContent;

  function init() {
    sidebar      = document.getElementById('quarto-margin-sidebar');
    titleBlock   = document.getElementById('title-block-header');
    mainEl       = document.querySelector('#quarto-content > main.content');
    quartoContent = document.getElementById('quarto-content');
  }

  function relocate() {
    if (!sidebar || !titleBlock || !mainEl || !quartoContent) return;

    if (window.innerWidth <= BREAKPOINT) {
      // Place sidebar after the title block, inside main
      if (sidebar.parentNode !== mainEl) {
        titleBlock.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', sidebar);
      }
    } else {
      // Restore sidebar as first child of #quarto-content (before main)
      if (sidebar.parentNode !== quartoContent) {
        quartoContent.insertBefore(sidebar, mainEl);
      }
    }
  }

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    init();
    relocate();
  });
  window.addEventListener('resize', relocate);
})();
</script>
```
